use_cases: Site-wide footer for SaaS and fintech platforms providing company information and navigation links
Landing page footer with social media links and brand positioning
Web application footer with resource links and support navigation
ai_summary: A minimalist site footer component featuring a responsive grid layout with company links, resource links, and social media icons. The design uses subtle radial gradients and monospace typography for a clean fintech aesthetic. Includes hover states on social links and adapts between mobile and desktop layouts using Tailwind CSS grid system.
